name: Ying

skills.name: Spear Will - Sweeping Fire
skills.description: Skills grant marks (up to 3 stacks), and different stacks upgrade thefollowing Basic Attacks into different skills.

skills.name: Moonslash
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies within range and launches them.

skills.name: Cloudchaser
skills.description: Dashes to the target location then sweeps the enemy, slowing them and dealing damage. Skill can be charged to enhance damage and gain extra effects

skills.name: Starburn
skills.description: Dashes in the target direction, damaging and launching enemies. Then returns to the start point to damage and pull enemies a short distance. Gains lmmunity and damage reduction while using. Use again to deal continuous damage to the target area.

tips: Ying (Assassin): Tier A on international ranked — 52.35% WR.
Build core: Relentless Blade, Boots of Tranquility, Meteor.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 52.35%, pick 1.03%, ban 0.19%, popularity tier A.
Counters Kongming, Liang, Yuhuan · Weak into Di Renjie, Erin, Lady Sun.

faqs.question: Is Ying good in current season?
faqs.answer: Ying is Tier A Assassin with 52.35% win rate, 1.03% pick rate, and 0.19% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Ying build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Relentless Blade, Boots of Tranquility, Meteor, Axe of Torment, Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Ying?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Ying: Di Renjie, Erin, Lady Sun. Ying is strong into Kongming, Liang, Yuhuan.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Kongming, Liang, Yuhuan. Countered by: Di Renjie, Erin, Lady Sun.
